By major project:

Shanghai Jiaozhai Technology Co., Ltd., responsible for titles like Tears of Themis, Zenless Zone Zero, added 771 staff, reaching 1,059.

Shanghai miHoYo Haiyuan-cheng Technology Co., Ltd., behind Honkai: Star Rail, added 223, reaching 1,323.
Meanwhile,

Shanghai miHoYo Tianming Technology Co., Ltd., developer of Genshin Impact, cut 550 staff, down to 2,633.

miHoYo Technology (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., which handles Honkai Impact 3rd, reduced 102 employees, ending the year with 392 employees.
